name: JioHotstar
description: JioHotstar streams major sports events in India.
freeNote: Free with ads, premium tier removes ads and adds extra features

name: Sky Sports
description: Sky Sports broadcasts major sporting events in the UK.

name: Willow TV
description: Willow TV is the leading cricket streaming platform in the USA.

name: SonyLIV
description: SonyLIV streams football, tennis and cricket events in India.

name: Peacock
description: Peacock streams Premier League football in the United States.

name: Paramount+
description: Paramount+ streams UEFA competitions in the United States.

name: ZEE5
description: ZEE5 streams major football tournaments and FIFA events in India.

name: TNT Sports
description: TNT Sports broadcasts UEFA Champions League in the UK.

name: FanCode
description: FanCode streams cricket events including PSL in India.

name: ESPN+
description: ESPN+ streams La Liga, Bundesliga and a wide range of international sports in the United States.

name: GXR
description: GXR streams selected international football competitions in India.
freeNote: Free to watch, no subscription required

name: Premier Sports
description: Premier Sports broadcasts international football and sports competitions in the United Kingdom.

name: BBC iPlayer
description: BBC iPlayer streams Wimbledon and major sporting events in the United Kingdom.
freeNote: Free with a UK TV Licence

name: Eurosport Player
description: Eurosport Player streams tennis, cycling and other sports events in Europe.

name: FuboTV
description: FuboTV streams football, tennis and other sports events in the United States.

name: Tennis Channel
description: Tennis Channel streams major tennis tournaments including Wimbledon and US Open in the United States.

name: F1 TV Pro
description: Official Formula 1 streaming service offering live races, onboard cameras and exclusive content.

name: Kayo Sports
description: Kayo Sports is Australia's leading sports streaming platform, covering cricket, football, F1, NBA and golf.

name: Fox Sports Australia
description: Fox Sports Australia is the primary TV broadcaster for cricket and golf in Australia, available via Foxtel.

name: Channel 7 / 7plus
description: Channel 7 and its digital platform 7plus broadcast selected free-to-air cricket matches in Australia, including most Big Bash League games.
freeNote: Free-to-air, no subscription required. Covers most Big Bash League matches.

name: Ten Sports Pakistan
description: Ten Sports is a major cricket broadcaster in Pakistan, carrying PSL and other major tournaments.

name: Tapmad TV
description: Tapmad TV is a Pakistan-based streaming platform offering free and premium live cricket coverage, including PSL.
freeNote: Free tier available with ads; premium removes ads and unlocks extra features

name: PTV Sports
description: PTV Sports is Pakistan's national free-to-air sports channel, broadcasting major cricket tournaments.
freeNote: Free-to-air national broadcaster, no subscription required

name: SuperSport
description: SuperSport is the leading sports broadcaster across Sub-Saharan Africa, covering cricket, football and more, available via DStv.

name: Prime Video
description: Prime Video streams a growing range of live sports globally, including the NBA, WNBA, golf majors, and select cricket tournaments such as the ICC Women's T20 World Cup, sometimes for free.
freeNote: Free for select events like the ICC Women's T20 World Cup in Australia and South Africa, but generally requires a Prime subscription

name: ESPN via Foxtel
description: ESPN's NBA and WNBA coverage is available in Australia through Foxtel and the Kayo Sports streaming platform.

name: NBA League Pass
description: NBA League Pass is the official global streaming service for live and on-demand NBA games, with pricing that varies significantly by country.

name: YouTube (NBA Free Games)
description: The NBA's official YouTube channel streams select games for free in India during the regular season and playoffs.
freeNote: Select games only, not full season coverage

name: TNT Sports (WNBA)
description: TNT Sports holds exclusive UK rights to WNBA regular season games, the All-Star Game, playoffs and Finals.

name: ESPN+
description: ESPN+ streams early-round coverage of golf majors and select NBA/WNBA games in the USA.

name: CBS Sports / Paramount+
description: CBS broadcasts weekend rounds of the Masters and other PGA Tour majors, with early streaming coverage on Paramount+.

name: FOX Sports
description: FOX Sports holds US broadcast rights to major football events including FIFA World Cup and UEFA EURO.

name: NBC Sports
description: NBC Sports broadcasts IndyCar Series races in the USA, with streaming available via Peacock.

name: CBS Sports
description: CBS Sports broadcasts Formula E races in the USA, with streaming available via Paramount+.

name: Sky Sport NZ
description: Sky Sport is New Zealand's primary broadcaster for international cricket, football and F1.

name: TSN
description: TSN is Canada's leading sports network, carrying F1, FIFA tournaments and WNBA coverage.

name: DAZN
description: DAZN holds the rights to LaLiga, Premier League and F1 races in Spain.

name: Canal+
description: Canal+ is the exclusive home of every F1 session and major football coverage in France.
